title: zaluzianskya peduncularis
intro: Zaluzianskya peduncularis, also known as the evening stock or night-scented stock, is a plant species belonging to the family Polemoniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Zaluzianskya peduncularis include relief from fever, coughs, and colds, as well as its use as a digestive aid and to treat respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Zaluzianskya peduncularis include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicine for its various health benefits.
